content.text: Projects are the top-level organizational unit in Circuit Tracks. Each project contains 8 sessions, and each session contains 8 patterns - giving you 64 patterns per project.
Press the Projects button to enter project view. The display shows your project list, and the pads light up to indicate available projects.

content.title: Samples Are Shared
content.text: Samples are NOT stored in projects - they're global. If you change a sample, it changes in all projects that use it.
Circuit Tracks auto-saves frequently, but you should manually save before powering off:

items: Hold Shift and press Projects to save
Navigate to an empty slot using the pads or Macro 1
Press to select the empty slot
A new blank project is created

content.text: Use Novation Components to backup projects to your computer. You can also share projects with other Circuit Tracks users.
Regular backups are recommended. Projects can be restored if your Circuit Tracks has issues.
Circuit Tracks can store up to 256 projects internally. That's over 16,000 patterns of storage!
